title: Golden Ninja Warrior
overview: A rivalry between the Golden Ninja Warriors and the Red Ninja Warriors. The Red Ninja Warriors want a Golden Ninja Statue that the Golden Ninjas Have, which is never seen by the audience. Then, the action moves to Hong Kong where we see a criminal organization running a prostitution racket, made up of kidnapped women, out of a hotel.  An English dub of the 1985 Taiwanese film "霹靂女王蜂 " (Thunder Cat Woman) with an added opening credits sequence.
